confidenceReason: The load-test rollup and forecast were compared directly.

criteriaResults.rationale: The evidence leaves a visible gap below target.
The evidence is still sufficient to rely on with follow-up.

ratingDrivers.description: The load-test rollup reaches 1.4x forecast traffic, but the sales forecast changed after the latest run.

rationale: Capacity evidence is close enough to rely on with follow-up, but it no longer proves the current forecast at target.
